CVE-2021-23445.title: This affects the package datatables.net before 1.11.3. If an arra ...
CVE-2021-23445.summary: This affects the package datatables.net before 1.11.3. If an array is passed to the HTML escape entities function it would not have its contents escaped.

CVE-2021-36713.title: Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the DataTables plug-i ...
CVE-2021-36713.summary: Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the DataTables plug-in 1.9.2 for jQuery allows attackers to run arbitrary code via the sBaseName parameter to function _fnCreateCookie. NOTE: 1.9.2 is a version from 2012.
